name: Sun-Dried Tomato Pesto
recipeIngredient: 1 Cup Oil-Packed Sun Dried Tomatoes, drained (approximately 6 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Use some of the oil from the sun-dried tomatoes jar.
2. Combine the tomatoes, Parmesan cheese, basil, pine nuts, and garlic in a food processor.
3. With the machine running, gradually add the olive oil until a smooth paste forms.
4. Add salt and pepper to taste.
